title: platycerium coronarium
intro: Platycerium coronarium, also known as the Crown of Thorns or Coral Tree Staghorn, is a species of epiphytic fern native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Platycerium coronarium have been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
